caption:
Industry benchmarks suggest only 17% of service businesses answer a new lead within an hour.

The Lead Response Audit shows you exactly where you stand.

Four inputs: monthly leads, average job value, your response speed, and your response method.

It hands back your response score, an estimate of how many leads go cold every month, and the revenue that's at risk.

Built by Black Arrow. Free to run, no signup, no card.

DM "TOOLS" and run it on your own numbers.

#SpeedToLead #ServiceBusiness #HomeServices #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessGrowth
rationale: Carousels are currently the format that wins saves, depth, and conversion for B2B offer content, and this is the first solo feature of the Lead Response Audit, filling the under-served Offers/Lead Magnets slot with an unclaimed tool.
